mapper.select: SELECT id, site_cd, site_nm, customer_nm, spec, remark, bid_price, proc_price, processing_cost, argon_cost, insul_cost, struct_cost, edge_cost, etching_cost, step_cost, deform_cost, temper1_cost, temper2_cost, temper3_cost, total_processing_cost FROM site_price WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd} ORDER BY id
